title: Dot-Com Startup Pitch
text:
## Dot-Com Startup Pitch

**Company name:** {adjective}{noun}.com

**Mission:** To help busy people {verb} their {plural noun} on the information superhighway.

**Target user:** {person}, age {number}, currently trapped in a {adjective} cubicle.

**Product demo:** Click the {color} button and watch a {adjective} {object} appear in only {number} seconds.

**Revenue model:** Sell {plural noun}, banner ads, and one {adverb} expensive subscription.

**Investor ask:** ${number} million and a conference room with {food}.
